About Organization

The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government jobs in Rajasthan.

The organization aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates in the state.

About the Programme

The Rajasthan RSSB Patwari Recruitment 2025 is a government job recruitment program aimed at filling vacancies for the post of Patwari in Rajasthan.

The program is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria.
